name: semantic_duplicate_redescribe
description: 10-turn stress test for the CB semantic-variant suppression rule + ObjectHelper soft-match guard. Starts in Ken Williams' office (Sierra On-Line, 1987) and repeatedly re-observes the same environment with noun-phrase drift variants to verify no duplicate object records are promoted.
world_prompt: My name is Ken williams. My wife's name is roberta. She's not home right now. But I am, working at my desk on the finishing touches of what is to soon become our most popular game ever. I open the game and stare at the title screen which says....

turns.action: look over the papers on the desk
glance at the photo on the desk
look at the stack of design documents
look at the monitor screen carefully
